mapper.select: SELECT qs.challenge_date, qa.score, 9 - qa.score AS wrong_count, COUNT(ar.id) FILTER (WHERE ar.review_status = 'RECOVERED') AS recovered_count FROM quiz_attempts qa JOIN quiz_sets qs ON qs.id = qa.quiz_set_id LEFT JOIN answer_reviews ar ON ar.source_attempt_id = qa.id AND ar.user_id = qa.user_id WHERE qa.user_id = #{userId} AND qs.challenge_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY qs.challenge_date, qa.id, qa.score ORDER BY qs.challenge_date
